# LQR

State-feedback control that minimizes a quadratic cost for a linear dynamical system.

<div class="algorithm-meta">
  <span>Control</span>
  <span>feedback control, optimal control, linear systems</span>
  <span>Mermaid</span>
</div>

## Flowchart

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    A[Define linear system and cost matrices] --> B[Solve Riccati equation]
    B --> C[Compute feedback gain K]
    C --> D[Measure current state]
    D --> E[Apply control u equals minus Kx]
    E --> F[Propagate system]
    F --> G{Task finished?}
    G -- No --> D
    G -- Yes --> H[Stop]
```

## Notes

- Infinite-horizon LQR uses the algebraic Riccati equation.
- The feedback law is linear in the state and often written as u = -Kx.
